news.t: Cathie Wood's ARK Space ETF is the largest shareholder of Cathie Wood's 3D printing ETF

holdings.infoBox: PRNT is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Velo3D stock at 7.06%, Xometry at 6.29%, SIEMENS AG-REG at 5.03%, 3D Systems at 4.90%, and Synopsys at 4.71%.

overview.description: The 3D Printing ETF (PRNT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Total 3D-Printing index. The fund tracks a tiered, equal-weighted index composed of stocks that are directly involved in 3D printing and 3D printing-related businesses. PRNT was launched on Jul 19, 2016 and is issued by ARK.

data.title: Cathie Wood steps down as portfolio manager on two ARK ETFs
data.text: Yahoo Finance reporter Alexandra Semenova breaks down Cathie Wood's decision to hand off her role as portfolio manager on two ETFs.

data.title: Cathie Wood's ARK Space ETF is the largest shareholder of Cathie Wood's 3D printing ETF
data.text: After Wednesday's trades, Cathie Wood's ARK Space Exploration & Innovation ETF now owns nearly 5.8% of her own 3D printing fund, according to data compiled by Bloomberg. The ARKX Space exchange-traded...
